import os

import anthropic
client = anthropic.Anthropic\(\)

# Test short name
try:
    msg = client.messages.create\(
        model=''claude-sonnet-4-5'',
        max_tokens=10,
        messages=[{''role'': ''user'', ''content'': ''Say hi''}]
    \)
    print\(''SUCCESS with claude-sonnet-4-5:'', msg.content[0].text\)
except anthropic.NotFoundError as e:
    print\(''NOT FOUND with claude-sonnet-4-5:'', str\(e\)[:200]\)
except anthropic.BadRequestError as e:
    print\(''BAD REQUEST with claude-sonnet-4-5:'', str\(e\)[:200]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(''ERROR with claude-sonnet-4-5:'', type\(e\).__name__, str\(e\)[:200]\)
")

from app.services.ai_extractor import extract_financials

    print\(''SUCCESS! Fields:'', sum\(1 for v in result.values\(\) if v is not None\)\)

Bash(bash -c 'source backend/venv/bin/activate && python3 -c ""
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, \\"".\\""\)
from backend.app.config.database import db_session
from backend.app.models.financial_data import FinancialData
from backend.app.models.stock import Stock
from sqlalchemy import desc

stock = db_session.query\(Stock\).filter_by\(in_pool=True, is_active=True\).first\(\)
if stock:
    fd = db_session.query\(FinancialData\).filter_by\(stock_id=stock.id\).order_by\(desc\(FinancialData.fiscal_year\)\).first\(\)
    if fd:
        print\(f\\""Stock: {stock.symbol}, fd.id={fd.id}, year={fd.fiscal_year}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""gross_margin={fd.gross_margin}, roic={fd.roic}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""current_ratio={fd.current_ratio}\\""\)
    else:
        print\(f\\""No FD for {stock.symbol}\\""\)
""')

Bash(bash -c 'source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c ""
from app.config.database import db_session
from app.models.financial_data import FinancialData
from app.models.stock import Stock
from sqlalchemy import desc

stock = db_session.query\(Stock\).filter_by\(in_pool=True, is_active=True\).first\(\)
if stock:
    fd = db_session.query\(FinancialData\).filter_by\(stock_id=stock.id\).order_by\(desc\(FinancialData.fiscal_year\)\).first\(\)
    if fd:
        print\(f\\""Stock: {stock.symbol}, fd.id={fd.id}, year={fd.fiscal_year}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""gross_margin={fd.gross_margin}, roic={fd.roic}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""current_ratio={fd.current_ratio}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""total_assets={fd.total_assets}, total_liabilities={fd.total_liabilities}\\""\)
        print\(f\\""total_equity={fd.total_equity}\\""\)
    else:
        print\(f\\""No FD for {stock.symbol}\\""\)
""')

Bash(bash -c 'source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c ""
from app.config.database import db_session
from app.models.annual_report import AnnualReport
from app.models.stock import Stock

stock = db_session.query\(Stock\).filter_by\(symbol=\\""INTC\\""\).first\(\)
if stock:
    reports = db_session.query\(AnnualReport\).filter_by\(stock_id=stock.id\).all\(\)
    for r in reports:
        print\(f\\""id={r.id} year={r.fiscal_year} downloaded={r.is_downloaded} processed={r.is_processed} error={r.analysis_error}\\""\)
else:
    print\(\\""INTC not found\\""\)
""')

from app.utils.validation import validate_symbol
sym, err = validate_symbol\(''AAPL''\)

sym, err = validate_symbol\(''SZ000858''\)
assert sym == ''SZ000858'' and err is None
sym, err = validate_symbol\(''hk00700''\)
assert sym == ''HK00700'' and err is None
sym, err = validate_symbol\(''123''\)
assert err is not None
print\(''validation: ALL TESTS PASSED''\)
")
